target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Target is an armored vehicle with catastrophic structural damage; turret and hull are severely deformed and fragmented; no major components remain intact; consistent with K-kill.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: The vehicle is on its side with severe structural deformation; main turret and hull are shattered; internal components are exposed and charred; no identifiable functional parts remain.

summary: Two military vehicles assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence; both show catastrophic structural damage with no identifiable functional parts remaining. The scene depicts a desolate, smoke-filled battlefield with at least two heavily damaged armored vehicles, one overturned and one on its side, indicating significant combat engagement. The likely functional impact is complete loss of operational capability for both targets.
